name: aldc
description: AI-Native AL Development Collection for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central. 4 agents + 11 skills + 6 workflows for extension-only development with TDD, event-driven architecture, and HITL gates.

agents.name: al-architect
agents.description: Solution design, data modeling, integration strategy for BC extensions

agents.name: al-conductor
agents.description: TDD orchestration: plan → implement → review → commit

agents.name: al-developer
agents.description: Tactical AL implementation, debugging, and code generation

agents.name: al-presales
agents.description: PERT estimation, SWOT analysis, cost breakdown for BC projects

agents.name: al-implement-subagent
agents.description: Internal: executes implementation phases under al-conductor

agents.name: al-planning-subagent
agents.description: Internal: creates detailed implementation plans under al-conductor

agents.name: al-review-subagent
agents.description: Internal: reviews code quality and AL best practices under al-conductor

agents.name: al-agent-builder
agents.description: Creates custom agents for BC AI Development Toolkit

skills.name: al-spec-create
skills.description: Create functional-technical specifications before development

skills.name: al-build
skills.description: Build, package, and deploy BC extensions

skills.name: al-pr-prepare
skills.description: Prepare pull requests with documentation and validation

skills.name: al-memory-create
skills.description: Generate/update memory.md for session continuity

skills.name: al-context-create
skills.description: Generate project context.md for AI assistants

skills.name: al-initialize
skills.description: Complete environment and workspace setup including rules injection

skills.name: skill-api
skills.description: API pages, OData, REST integration patterns

skills.name: skill-copilot
skills.description: AI features, PromptDialog, Copilot toolkit patterns

skills.name: skill-debug
skills.description: Debugging, snapshot debugging, telemetry analysis

skills.name: skill-estimation
skills.description: PERT estimation, complexity scoring, effort analysis

skills.name: skill-events
skills.description: Event subscribers, publishers, integration events

skills.name: skill-extension-manifest
skills.description: app.json configuration and extension manifest management

skills.name: skill-migrate
skills.description: BC version migration, upgrade codeunits

skills.name: skill-pages
skills.description: Page types, FastTabs, actions, UI patterns

skills.name: skill-performance
skills.description: CPU profiling, FlowField optimization, query tuning

skills.name: skill-permissions
skills.description: Permission sets, XLIFF, security configuration

skills.name: skill-testing
skills.description: TDD, test strategy, AL Test Toolkit patterns

skills.name: skill-translate
skills.description: XLF translation, NAB AL Tools integration

skills.name: skill-agent-toolkit
skills.description: AI Development Toolkit agent patterns

skills.name: skill-agent-task-patterns
skills.description: 8 SDK integration patterns for BC agents

skills.name: skill-agent-instructions
skills.description: Agent instruction generation for BC AI Toolkit

skills.name: al-agent-create
skills.description: Create new agents for BC AI Development Toolkit

skills.name: al-agent-instructions-create
skills.description: Generate agent instructions for AI Toolkit

skills.name: al-agent-task
skills.description: Create agent task definitions

bcSandboxUrl.description: URL of your Business Central sandbox environment (e.g., https://businesscentral.dynamics.com/your-tenant)

publisherName.description: Your extension publisher name for app.json
